title: Get the cost records of a BC and ad accounts
content:
Use this endpoint to retrieve the cost records at the ad account and Business Center levels. > **Note**
> - Only members with Finance Manager or Finance Analyst role can retrieve the cost records of a Business Center. To configure or update the Finance roles for members, use [/bc/member/invite/](https://business-api.tiktok.com/portal/docs?id=1739939455765505) and [/bc/member/update/](https://business-api.tiktok.com/portal/docs?id=1739696704424961). > - The cost data typically has a latency of up to 10 hours. API responses are immediate but reflect cost data from approximately 10 hours ago. ## Request **Endpoint** https://business-api.tiktok.com/open_api/v1.3/bc/account/cost/get/ **Method** GET **Header** ```xtable |Field{30%}|Data Type{15%}|Description{55%}| |---|---|---| |Access-Token {Required}|string|Authorized access token. For details, see [Authentication](https://business-api.tiktok.com/portal/docs?id=1738373164380162).| ``` **Parameters** ``` xtable |Field{30%}|Data Type{15%}|Description{55%}| |--- |--- |--- | | bc_id {Required}| string | Business Center ID.

To obtain the list of Business Centers that you have access to, use [/bc/get/](https://business-api.tiktok.com/portal/docs?id=1737115687501826). | | filtering | object | Filtering conditions. | #| keyword | string | Search keyword.

The fuzzy match is supported.

You can specify an advertiser ID or name as search keyword. | #| start_date | string | Query start date, in the format of `YYYY-MM-DD` (ad account time zone).

You can either specify `start_date` and `end_date` simultaneously or leave both `start_date` and `end_date` unspecified.
  • If you specify `start_date` and `end_date` simultaneously, the maximum time range is 365 days.
  • If you leave both `start_date` and `end_date` unspecified, the results for the last 90 days will be returned by default.
| #| end_date | string | Query end date, in the format of `YYYY-MM-DD` (ad account time zone).

You can either specify `start_date` and `end_date` simultaneously or leave both `start_date` and `end_date` unspecified.
  • If you specify `start_date` and `end_date` simultaneously, the maximum time range is 365 days.
  • If you leave both `start_date` and `end_date` unspecified, the results for the last 90 days will be returned by default.
| | page | integer | Current page number.

Value range : ≥ 1.
Default value: 1. | | page_size | integer | Page size.

Value range: 1-50.
Default value: 10. | ``` ### Example ```xcodeblock (code curl http) curl --location --request GET 'https://business-api.tiktok.com/open_api/v1.3/bc/account/cost/get/?bc_id={{bc_id}}&filtering={"start_date": "{{start_date}}", "end_date": "{{end_date}}"}&page=1&page_size=50' \ --header 'Access-Token: {{Access-Token}}' (/code) ``` ## Response ``` xtable |Field{30%}|Type{15%}|Description{55%}| |---|---|---| |code |number|Response code. For the complete list of response codes and descriptions, see [Appendix-Return Code](https://ads.tiktok.com/marketing_api/docs?id=1737172488964097). | |message|string|Response message. For details, see [Appendix - Return Codes](https://ads.tiktok.com/marketing_api/docs?id=1737172488964097).| |request_id |string|The log ID of a request, which uniquely identifies the request. | |data |object|Returned data.| #| cost_list | object[] | The list of cost records for each advertiser. | ##| advertiser_id | string | Advertiser ID. | ##| advertiser_name | string | Advertiser name. | ##| amount | number | Total cost amount for the advertiser.

Example: -1376616. | ##| cash_amount | number | Cash cost amount for the advertiser.

Example: -1376616. | ##| grant_amount | number | Ad credit cost amount for the advertiser.

Example: 0. | ##| tax_amount | number | Estimated tax amount for the advertiser.

Example: -68831. | ##| currency | string | The currency of the advertiser.

Example: `USD`. | #| transaction_summary | object | A summary of cost records for the Business Center. | ##| amount | number | Total cost amount for the Business Center.

Example: -484400000. | ##| cash_amount | number | Cash cost amount for the Business Center.

Example: -484400000. | ##| grant_amount | number | Ad credit cost amount for the Business Center.

Example: 0. | ##| tax_amount | number | Estimated tax amount for the Business Center.

Example: -2400000. | ##| currency | string | The currency of the Business Center.

Example: `USD`. | #| page_info | object | Pagination information. | ##| page | integer | Current page number. | ##| page_size | integer | Page size. | ##| total_number | integer | Total number of results. | ##| total_page | integer | Total number of pages. | ``` ### Example ```xcodeblock (code Success-Response http) HTTPS/1.1 200 OK { "code": 0, "message": "OK", "request_id": "{{request_id}}", "data": { "cost_list": [ { "advertiser_id": "{{advertiser_id}}", "advertiser_name": "{{advertiser_name}}", "amount": {{amount}}, "cash_amount": {{cash_amount}}, "currency": "VND", "grant_amount": {{grant_amount}}, "tax_amount": {{tax_amount}} }, { "advertiser_id": "{{advertiser_id}}", "advertiser_name": "{{advertiser_name}}", "amount": {{amount}}, "cash_amount": {{cash_amount}}, "currency": "VND", "grant_amount": 0, "tax_amount": {{tax_amount}} } ], "page_info": { "page": 1, "page_size": 50, "total_number": 2, "total_page": 1 }, "transaction_summary": { "amount": {{amount}}, "cash_amount": {{cash_amount}}, "currency": "VND", "grant_amount": {{grant_amount}}, "tax_amount": {{tax_amount}} } } } (/code) ```
